title: How to get a police certificate - Iraq - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate - Iraq
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.
You do not have to provide a police certificate from Iraq unless we ask for one.
Do I need to provide a police certificate when applying for permanent residence? If we ask for one.
If you have been asked to provide a police certificate for this country, follow the instructions below.

## How and where do I get one?
Applicants should present their identification card or passport in person at any Criminal Investigation Department in Iraq. Fingerprints will be taken.

### Non-Resident Requests
Applicants should apply for a police certificate at the consular section of the nearest Iraqi embassy.
